name: Sweet Pheromones
descrip: Blow a pink mist of intoxicating aphrodisiacs.
outcome: [AttackerName] sensually sways [AttackerHisOrHer] curvaceous body back and forth in place, gradually scattering a large cloud of pink pheromones into the air, the languid raunchy display alone sending twinges of titillating lust through [TargetName].
miss: [AttackerName] sensually sways [AttackerHisOrHer] curvaceous body back and forth in place, gradually scattering a large cloud of pink pheromones into the air, but [TargetName] manages to hold [TargetHisOrHer] breath and ignore the raunchy display!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] can't help but breathe in some of [AttackerName]'s lewd fragrance amid the eye-catching show, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] groaning in wanting delight as [TargetHisOrHer] body throbs with mounting desire!
